description.ko: 생물 발광 생명체들이 번성하고 압도적인 수압 속에 고대의 비밀이 숨겨진 바다의 가장 깊은 해구로 여행을 떠나보세요.
description.en: Embark on a journey to the deepest trenches of the ocean where bioluminescent creatures thrive and ancient secrets lie hidden in the crushing pressure.

prompt: Ultra-realistic 8k cinematic shot of a futuristic submersible AQUA-5 exploring a glowing underwater trench, bioluminescent jellyfish, dark deep sea environment, particles of marine snow, high contrast, atmospheric lighting.
